hero.description: I-Horizon Tech d.o.o. yinkampani yezobuchwepheshe yomhlaba wonke ezinze eSarajevo, ehambisa izixazululo zesoftware ezinqenqemeni kumabhizinisi kuwo wonke amazwekazi amathathu.

mission.title: Umsebenzi
mission.description: Sisiza izinhlangano ukuthi ziphendule imibono yokuvelela ibe yimikhiqizo ethembekile yedijithali eyakha inani lebhizinisi elilinganisekayo.
points: Vumelanisa ukulethwa kwezobuchwepheshe nemiphumela ecacile yebhizinisi.
Yakha izinhlelo zesikhathi eside ezihlala zigcinwa njengoba amaqembu ekhula.
Sebenzisana eduze nababambiqhaza kusuka kumasu kuya ekubulaweni.

expertise.title: Ubuchwepheshe
expertise.description: Amaqembu ethu ahlukahlukene ahlanganisa ukujula kobunjiniyela nokucabanga komkhiqizo kuzo zonke izitaki zobuchwepheshe zanamuhla.
points: Ukwakhiwa kwamafu, i-DevOps automation, nengqalasizinda eqinile.
I-AI / ML esetshenzisiwe, ukuhamba komsebenzi kwedatha, nemikhiqizo enikwe amandla ye-IoT.

approach.title: Indlela
approach.description: Senza ngemodeli esobala, ye-iterative egcina ukulethwa kubikezelwa ngenkathi kunciphisa ubungozi bomkhiqizo.
points: Thola: chaza ububanzi, izinto eziza kuqala, kanye namamethrikhi empumelelo kusenesikhathi.
Yakha: umkhumbi ngezinketho ezigxile ngama-loops aqhubekayo wempendulo.
Optimize: qapha imiphumela futhi uthuthukise ukusebenza ngokuhamba kwesikhathi.

cta.title: Ukulungele ukuguqula ibhizinisi lakho?
cta.description: Joyina uhlu olukhulayo lwezinkampani ezithembela ku-Horizon Tech ukuletha izixazululo ezintsha nemiphumela ehlukile.

hero.title: Xhumana nathi
hero.description: Ingabe unayo iphrojekthi engqondweni? Singathanda ukuzwa kuwe. Hlangana ukuze sixoxe ngokuthi singakusiza kanjani ukuletha imibono yakho ekuphileni.

form.title: Sithumelele umyalezo
form.success: Siyabonga ngomyalezo wakho. Sizobuyela kuwe kungakapheli amahora angama-24-48.
form.error: Kukhona okungahambi kahle. Sicela uzame futhi noma usithumelele i-imeyili ngqo.
form.subject: Isihloko *

placeholders.name: Igama lakho
placeholders.subject: Yini esingasiza ngayo?
placeholders.message: Sitshele ngophenyo lwakho noma iphrojekthi yakho ...

validation.messageMinLength: Umyalezo kufanele okungenani ube nezinhlamvu ezingu- {{count}} ubude.

reasons: I-AI / ML kanye nochwepheshe bokwakhiwa kwamafu

custom.title: Izixazululo Zangokwezifiso
custom.description: Ufuna isixazululo esenziwe ngokwezifiso? Sisebenza eduze namakhasimende ukuqonda izidingo eziyingqayizivele futhi silethe isoftware yangokwezifiso eshayela imiphumela elinganiselwayo.

faq.title: Unemibuzo eminingi?
faq.description: Hlola isigaba sethu se-FAQ ukuthola izimpendulo ezisheshayo

hero.description: Ithimba elihlukahlukene lobuchwepheshe, abaklami, kanye namasu akha imikhiqizo yedijithali enomthelela omkhulu ndawonye.

section.title: Ithimba lobuholi
section.description: Abaholi abanolwazi abaqondisa umbono nokukhula kwe-Horizon Tech

hamza.bio: Umholi onombono kanye nomakhi wezobuchwepheshe oneminyaka eyi-10 + kwisoftware yebhizinisi, onguchwepheshe ku-AI / ML, amapulatifomu amafu, kanye nokwakhiwa komkhiqizo ongaguquguquki.

ahmet.bio: Uchwepheshe we-cybersecurity ugxile ekwakhiweni kwezokuphepha kwebhizinisi, ingqalasizinda ephephile ye-prem, kanye nokulethwa kokuhambisana kuqala kwezindawo ezilawulwayo.

culture.title: Ukuphila e-Horizon Tech
culture.description: Sikhuthaza isiko lokuqamba izinto ezintsha, ukubambisana nokufunda okuqhubekayo

remoteFirst.title: Isiko Lokuqala Ekude
remoteFirst.description: Sebenza kusuka noma kuphi ngamahora aguquguqukayo nokugxila emiphumeleni, hhayi indawo.

collaborative.title: Imvelo yokubambisana
collaborative.description: Imicimbi yeqembu ejwayelekile, amaseshini okwabelana ngolwazi, nokubambisana okuphambene.

workLife.title: Ibhalansi Yomsebenzi Nokuphila
workLife.description: Inqubomgomo yeholide ephanayo, ukwesekwa kwezempilo yengqondo, nokuhlonipha isikhathi somuntu siqu.

innovation.title: Isikhathi sokuqamba
innovation.description: Isikhathi esingu-20% samaphrojekthi omuntu siqu, ama-hackathons, nokuhlola ubuchwepheshe obusha.

cta.title: Ufuna ukujoyina ithimba lethu?
cta.description: Sihlala sifuna abantu abanamakhono abakhathalela ubuciko, ubunikazi, nokuqamba izinto ezintsha.

hero.description: Joyina ithimba lonjiniyela abakha isoftware enqenqemeni yamakhasimende omhlaba wonke. Sebenza ukude, ukhule ngokuqhubekayo, futhi wenze umthelela wangempela.

steps.title: Faka isicelo
steps.description: Faka isicelo sakho futhi sizosibuyekeza kungakapheli izinsuku zebhizinisi ze-3.

steps.title: Ingxoxo Yokuqala
steps.description: Ucingo lwevidiyo lwemizuzu engama-30 ukuxoxa ngokuhlangenwe nakho kwakho nokulindelwe.

steps.title: Ubuchwepheshe
steps.description: Ingxoxo yezobuchwepheshe noma ukuzivocavoca okusebenzayo ukukhombisa amakhono akho.

steps.title: Ukunikezwa
steps.description: Hlangana neqembu bese uthola isipho sakho sokujoyina i-Horizon Tech.

jobs.title: Izikhundla ezivulekile
jobs.description: Thola ithuba lakho elilandelayo bese ujoyina ithimba lethu elikhulayo

listings.title: Unjiniyela ophezulu we-Full-Stack
listings.description: Yakha izinhlelo zokusebenza zebhizinisi eziguquguqukayo usebenzisa i-React, Node.js, nobuchwepheshe befu.

listings.title: Unjiniyela we-DevOps
listings.description: Ukuklama nokugcina amapayipi e-CI / CD, ingqalasizinda njengekhodi, nezinhlelo zokuqapha.

listings.title: Unjiniyela we-AI / ML
listings.description: Thuthukisa amamodeli wokufunda ngomshini nezixazululo ze-AI zamakhasimende ebhizinisi.

listings.title: Umklami womkhiqizo
listings.description: Dala okuhlangenwe nakho komsebenzisi okuhle, okunembile kwezinhlelo zokusebenza eziyinkimbinkimbi zebhizinisi.

listings.title: Izixazululo Architect
listings.description: Hlela izixazululo zobuchwepheshe zokuphela kokuphela futhi uqondise amaklayenti ngokuguqulwa kwedijithali.

listings.title: Umbhali Wezobuchwepheshe
listings.description: Yakha imibhalo ebanzi, ama-tutorials, nokuqukethwe kwezobuchwepheshe.

cta.title: Imibuzo mayelana nokusebenza lapha?
cta.description: Singathanda ukuzwa kuwe. Xhumana nathi futhi sizophendula noma yimiphi imibuzo mayelana nokuphila kwe-Horizon Tech.

hero.description: Hlola ukuthi sisize kanjani izinkampani kuzo zonke izimboni ukuthi ziguqule ukusebenza ngokusebenzisa ubuchwepheshe obusebenzayo, obunomthelela omkhulu.

items.title: Ukufuduka Kwamafu Nokuthuthukiswa Kwesimanje
items.description: Ukuthuthela izinhlelo zebhange zakudala kwingqalasizinda yamafu ye-AWS ngaphandle kwesikhathi sokuphumula.
items.challenge: Ukwakhiwa kwefa kwe-monolithic okubangela izinkinga ze-scalability

items.title: Ipulatifomu yokuxilonga enikwe amandla yi-AI
items.description: Yakhiwe amamodeli we-ML wokuhlaziywa kwesithombe sezokwelapha ngokunemba kwe-95% +.
items.challenge: Izinqubo zokuxilonga ngesandla zithatha isikhathi eside kakhulu

items.title: Ideshibhodi ye-Real-Time Analytics
items.description: Ithuthukise ipulatifomu ye-BI ukucubungula imicimbi eyi-10M + nsuku zonke.
items.challenge: Akukho ukubonakala kwesikhathi sangempela kumamethrikhi webhizinisi abalulekile

cta.title: Ukulungele ukubhala indaba yakho yempumelelo?
cta.description: Ake sixoxe ngokuthi singakusiza kanjani ukuthi ufinyelele imiphumela efanayo futhi ukhule ngokuzethemba.

filters.title: Isihlungi sezimboni
filters.empty: Azikho izifundo zamacala ezihambisana nesihlungi somkhakha esikhethiwe.

hero.description: Izifundo zobuchwepheshe, ukuqonda komkhakha, kanye nezifundo ezisebenzayo ezivela emsebenzini wangempela wokulethwa.

featuredPost.title: Ikusasa Lokuthuthukiswa Kwamafu: Amathrendi Okufanele Uwabheke ngo-2025
featuredPost.excerpt: Hlola izitayela zakamuva ekuthuthukisweni kwendabuko yefu, kusuka ezakhiweni ezingenaseva kuya kukhompyutha onqenqemeni.

posts.title: Ukwakha ama-Microservices angama-Scalable nge-Azure Kubernetes Service
posts.excerpt: Umhlahlandlela osebenzayo wokwakha nokuhambisa ama-microservices usebenzisa i-AKS.

posts.title: Ukufunda ngomshini ekukhiqizeni: Izifundo ezifundwayo
posts.excerpt: Izifundo ezihlolwe emkhakheni kusuka ekuthumeleni amamodeli we-ML esikalini.

posts.title: Impendulo 19: Yini entsha nokuthi kungani ibalulekile
posts.excerpt: Ukucwila okujulile ku-React 19 izici nemiphumela yokusebenza.

newsletter.title: Bhalisela i-newsletter yethu
newsletter.description: Thola izihloko zakamuva, ama-tutorials, kanye nemibono enikezwa masonto onke.
newsletter.note: Ayikho ugaxekile. Zikhiphe ohlwini nganoma yisiphi isikhathi.

hero.title: Ibhulogi ye-Horizon Tech Engineering
hero.description: Amanothi ensimini namaphethini asebenzayo avela emaqenjini akha imikhiqizo ye-AI, izinhlelo zebhizinisi, namapulatifomu amafu athembekile.

messages.passwordTooShort: Iphasiwedi kufanele okungenani ibe nezinhlamvu ezingu-8 ubude

general.title: Ulwazi lomuntu siqu
general.description: Buyekeza imininingwane yakho yomuntu siqu nemininingwane yokuxhumana
general.emailNotice: I-imeyili ayikwazi ukuguqulwa. Xhumana nosizo uma udinga usizo.

security.title: Izimiso Zokuphepha
security.description: Phatha igama lakho lokungena kanye nezintandokazi zokuphepha
security.passwordHint: Kufanele okungenani kube nezinhlamvu ezingu-8 ubude

preferences.title: Izintandokazi zesaziso
preferences.description: Lawula ukuthi uzithola kanjani izibuyekezo nezaziso

support.title: Isikhungo Sokusekela
support.subtitle: Thola usizo ngezinsizakalo zethu zokuthuthukiswa kwesoftware

faqs.question: Yiziphi izinsizakalo ezinikezwa yi-Horizon Tech?
faqs.answer: Sinikeza ukuthuthukiswa kwesoftware yangokwezifiso, izixazululo ze-AI / ML, ukwakhiwa kwefu, i-DevOps, ubuhlakani bebhizinisi, nezinsizakalo ze-IoT.

faqs.question: Ngiyiqala kanjani iphrojekthi nge-Horizon Tech?
faqs.answer: Xhumana nathi ngefomu noma nge-imeyili ngezidingo zakho. Sizohlela ucingo lokuthola futhi sabelane ngesiphakamiso.

faqs.question: Ingabe unikeza ukusekelwa okuqhubekayo nokugcinwa?
faqs.answer: Yebo. Sinikeza ukusekela nokugcinwa kwamaphakheji afaka ukulungiswa kwamaphutha, izibuyekezo zokuphepha, nokuthuthukiswa kwesici.

education.title: Izinsiza zobuchwepheshe
education.subtitle: Imihlahlandlela, ama-tutorials, kanye nemikhuba emihle evela eqenjini le-Horizon Tech

hub.title: Ihabhu Lokufunda
hub.description: Hlola izinsizakusebenza zethu zobuchwepheshe ezikhethiwe kwifu, i-AI / ML, i-DevOps, kanye nokuthuthukiswa kwesoftware yesimanje.
hub.note: Lezi zinto zisekelwe ekuhlangenwe nakho kwangempela kwephrojekthi futhi zibuyekezwa njalo.

categories.title: I-AI ne-Machine Learning
categories.description: Amamodeli we-ML, isayensi yedatha, nokuhlanganiswa kwe-AI

training.title: Udinga ukuqeqeshwa ngokwezifiso?
training.description: Sinikeza ama-workshops enziwe ngokwezifiso amaqembu onjiniyela nomkhiqizo
training.text: Udinga ukuqeqeshwa kweqembu lezandla? Sinikeza ama-workshops angokwezifiso ekwakhiweni kwamafu, i-DevOps, kanye nemikhuba yesimanje yokulethwa.

unauthorized.title: Ukufinyelela kunqatshelwe
unauthorized.description: Awunayo imvume yokungena kuleli khasi. Thintana nomphathi wakho uma ucabanga ukuthi lokhu kuyiphutha.

notFound.title: Ikhasi alitholakali
notFound.description: Umzila owucelile awukho noma usuhambile. Ake sikubuyisele emuva ku-Horizon Tech endpoint.

terminal.line4: Sebenzisa enye yezinqamuleli ezingezansi ukuze uqhubeke

runtime.title: Kukhona okuphukile kuleli khasi
runtime.description: Udaba olungalindelekile luphazamise ukuhumusha. Ungazama kabusha ngokuphepha noma ubuyele ekhasini lasekhaya.

blog.title: Ukuphathwa kwebhulogi
blog.subtitle: Yakha, hlela futhi uphathe okuthunyelwe kwakho kwebhulogi

empty.message: Akukho okuthunyelwe kwebhulogi okwamanje. Dala iposi lakho lokuqala noma idatha yesampula yembewu.

delete.title: Susa okuthunyelwe
delete.confirmation: Unesiqiniseko sokuthi ufuna ukususa lokhu okuthunyelwe? Lesi senzo asikwazi ukuguqulwa.

delete.title: Susa isifundo secala
delete.confirmation: Ngabe unesiqiniseko sokuthi ufuna ukususa lesi sifundo samacala? Lesi senzo asikwazi ukuguqulwa.
